lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Fandom Wiki
sources.what: Conflict-zone mechanics, intensity tiers, and Spec Ops / Capital Ship details.

sources.label: Fandom Wiki
sources.what: On-foot (Odyssey) conflict-zone mechanics, infantry roles, and capture-point flow.

sources.label: edtools.cc
sources.what: Finds systems in active conflict and the faction states that spawn combat zones, filtered by reference system and range.

sources.label: E:D PvE Combat Wiki
sources.what: Community catalogue of known conflict-zone locations and CZ farming venues.

sources.label: Inara
sources.what: Live galaxy-wide tracker of active faction conflicts (wars / civil wars) that spawn conflict zones.

sources.label: YouTube — Down to Earth Astronomy
sources.what: Walkthrough of Update 7 conflict-zone changes: ship CZ mechanics, faction selection, war and civil-war states, and combat bond payouts.

sources.label: YouTube — Down to Earth Astronomy
sources.what: Livestream examining combat earnings, including conflict-zone combat bond payouts and the value of redeeming them.
